creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)

In make.conf

DISABLE_VULNERABILITIES=yes
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl
DEVELOPER=yes
MAKE_FORCE_JOBS=yes
WITH_DEBUG=yes
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=llvm=18
CC=clang18
CXX=clang++18

I will try both compile
